sentences.arabic: كَانَ جَدُّ سَامِرٍ يُحِبُّ الزِّرَاعَةَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Samirov djed je jako volio bavljenje poljoprivredom.
sentences.translationEn: Samir's grandfather loved farming very much.

sentences.arabic: عَلَّمَ سَامِرًا كَيْفَ يَزْرَعُ الطَّمَاطِمَ وَالْبَاذِنْجَانَ.
sentences.translation: Naučio je Samira kako saditi paradajz i patlidžan.
sentences.translationEn: He taught Samir how to plant tomatoes and eggplants.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ سَامِرٌ يَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْحَقْلِ كُلَّ إِجَازَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Samir je išao na polje za svaki odmor.
sentences.translationEn: Samir would go to the field every holiday.

sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ سَامِرٌ الزِّرَاعَةَ وَقَالَ إِنَّهُ سَيَكُونُ مُزَارِعًا.
sentences.translation: Samir je zavolio poljoprivredu i rekao da će biti farmer.
sentences.translationEn: Samir came to love farming and said he would become a farmer.
